resolved_question: Among Johnson & Johnson's subsidiaries listed in Exhibit 21, which operate in jurisdictions where Johnson & Johnson reports active litigation in Item 3?

expected_answer.summary: Johnson & Johnson Consumer Inc. (US-based) is named in Item 3 talc-products mass tort proceedings in multiple US state and federal courts. Janssen Biotech, Inc. (US) is named in opioid-related Item 3 proceedings in several US states. Various international subsidiaries (e.g., Janssen-Cilag GmbH in Germany) are named in pricing litigation reported in Item 3.

narrative_recovery: JNJ's Item 3 is dense — talc, opioid, and various pharma-pricing actions all live there. If paper-mirror returns a subset (just talc, just opioid), the recovery line is: 'the dual-channel pipeline retrieved partial — the value is that it found the subsidiary/jurisdiction join at all; dense RAG would have hit one section but not both.'
notes: DRAFT — CTO HITL pending. Talc + opioid pickup is conservative; the JNJ 10-K Item 3 typically has 5+ proceedings. CTO review should expand the structured list and confirm subsidiary names exactly match Exhibit 21 spelling.
